data.title: Exxon Mobil Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
State Street's Strategic Investment in Ethic Aims to Revolutionize Personalized Portfolios
data.description: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) shares down premarket on Thursday as State Street Global Advisors announces strategic partnership and investment in Ethic Inc.

data.title: Bill Gates Shares Original Code That Started It All As Microsoft Celebrates 50 Years: 'That Was The Revolution'
data.description: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) founder, Bill Gates, nostalgically looks back on the computer code he wrote 50 years ago, which played a pivotal role in the creation of the tech giant.

data.title: Vishay Unveils High-Precision RGBIR Sensor For Smarter Automotive Displays
data.description: Vishay Intertechnology shares are down 4.77% in premarket trading on Thursday, following the launch of its new AEC-Q100 qualified RGBIR color sensor, with the stock having lost over 28% in the past year.

data.title: Reddit Decides If This Social Security Strategy Is The Right Approach: "If You Die Before 70, Then It Was The Right Choice To Start Social Security At 62."
